scenario.name: UAC VQ PUBLISH
scenario.send:
PUBLISH sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport][local_ip_type] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: collector <sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 PUBLISH Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Event: vq-rtcpxr Content-Type: application/vq-rtcpxr Content-Length: [len]
VQSessionReport: CallTerm CallID: [call_id]@[local_ip] LocalID: sip:user1@[local_ip] RemoteID: sip:user2@[remote_ip] NLR=0.50 JDR=1.20 BLD=0.30 GLD=0.10 RTD=45.5 ESD=20.3 IAJ=5.2 MAJ=3.1 MOSLQ=4.5 MOSCQ=4.2 RLQ=92.0 RCQ=88.0 RERL=55.0
